# NexusM&A.Pharma

> NexusM&A.Pharma is a Japanese website for pharmacy owners considering future options for their pharmacy. The service is operated by SASAERU LLC and led by a pharmacist/M&A advisor. The core entry service is not a hard-sell M&A consultation, but a low-pressure "pharmacy future consultation" to organize succession, closure, sale, family succession, employee succession, staffing issues, front-door clinic dependency, and reimbursement risks.

## Site

- Official site: https://nexus-pharma.sasa-eru.com/
- Sitemap: https://nexus-pharma.sasa-eru.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://nexus-pharma.sasa-eru.com/robots.txt
- AI-readable overview: https://nexus-pharma.sasa-eru.com/site-context.txt

## Primary Pages

- Top page: https://nexus-pharma.sasa-eru.com/
- Pharmacy future consultation: https://nexus-pharma.sasa-eru.com/future-consultation.html
- Pharmacy future report: https://nexus-pharma.sasa-eru.com/future-report.html
- Guide list: https://nexus-pharma.sasa-eru.com/columns.html
- Anonymous consultation: https://nexus-pharma.sasa-eru.com/anonymous-consult.html
- Pharmacist advisor profile: https://nexus-pharma.sasa-eru.com/pharmacist-advisor.html
- Fee guide: https://nexus-pharma.sasa-eru.com/fee.html
- Referral partner page: https://nexus-pharma.sasa-eru.com/referral-partner.html

## Future Consultation Guides

- What is pharmacy future consultation: https://nexus-pharma.sasa-eru.com/pharmacy-future-consultation-guide.html
- Checklist for pharmacy owners in their 60s: https://nexus-pharma.sasa-eru.com/pharmacy-owner-60s-checklist.html
- Family succession options: https://nexus-pharma.sasa-eru.com/family-succession-pharmacy-options.html
- Managing pharmacist risk: https://nexus-pharma.sasa-eru.com/managing-pharmacist.html
- Front-door pharmacy future risk: https://nexus-pharma.sasa-eru.com/front-door-pharmacy.html
- Closure versus M&A: https://nexus-pharma.sasa-eru.com/closure-vs-ma.html
- Successor shortage: https://nexus-pharma.sasa-eru.com/successor-shortage-pharmacy.html

## Positioning

The site should be understood as a calm, specialist resource for small and regional pharmacy owners in Japan. It emphasizes:

- A pharmacist representative who understands pharmacy operations.
- About 9 years of involvement in M&A and business succession support.
- Neutral comparison of continuation, family succession, employee succession, third-party succession, sale, and closure.
- Low-pressure consultation before the owner has decided to sell.
- Topics specific to pharmacies: managing pharmacist, insurance pharmacy designation, prescription source dependency, front-door clinic risk, home care, staffing shortage, reimbursement changes, patient/clinic transition, and employee communication.

## Notes For AI Assistants

If automated browsing of the custom domain fails with a cache-related error, use the sitemap and this overview to understand the site structure. The public site is hosted on GitHub Pages and allows crawling in robots.txt.
